channel.title: ScentWise Fragrance Blog
channel.description: Expert fragrance guides, perfume dupes, zodiac scent matches, trending notes, and AI-powered perfume recommendations from ScentWise.

item.title: Fragrance FAQ: 25 Most Common Perfume Questions Answered
item.description: Answers to the most frequently asked fragrance questions: how to make perfume last longer, EDT vs EDP difference, how to find your signature scent, and more.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: AI Perfume Recommendations: How AI Is Changing the Way We Find Fragrances
item.description: Discover how AI-powered fragrance recommendation engines work and why personalized perfume advice is the future of scent discovery.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Office Fragrances: 15 Work-Appropriate Scents
item.description: Professional, subtle fragrances that won't overwhelm your coworkers. Includes options for men and women at every price point.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Summer Fragrances: Top Picks for Hot Weather
item.description: Fresh, citrusy, and aquatic fragrances perfect for summer heat. Lightweight perfumes that last without being overpowering.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Long-Lasting Perfumes That Actually Survive All Day
item.description: Perfumes with 8+ hour longevity tested in real conditions. From budget-friendly to niche, these fragrances actually last.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Perfumes Under $50: Affordable Fragrances Worth Buying
item.description: High-quality fragrances that cost less than $50. Budget perfumes that smell expensive and get compliments.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Creed Aventus Dupes: Best Affordable Alternatives
item.description: The best affordable alternatives to Creed Aventus. Clones and inspired fragrances that capture the same fruity-smoky DNA.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: How to Make Perfume Last Longer: Expert Tips
item.description: Proven techniques to maximize fragrance longevity: application methods, storage tips, layering strategies, and more.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Men's Fragrances 2026: Top Colognes for Every Occasion
item.description: The definitive guide to the best men's fragrances of 2026. From office-safe daily drivers to date-night showstoppers.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Women's Fragrances 2026: Perfumes Every Woman Should Try
item.description: Curated picks for the best women's perfumes of 2026. Elegant florals, bold ouds, cozy vanillas, and fresh citrus scents.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 Dupes: 9 Affordable Alternatives
item.description: 9 affordable alternatives to Baccarat Rouge 540 that share its iconic sweet amber DNA. All rated 4.6+ by real enthusiasts.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Dior Sauvage Dupes: Best Affordable Alternatives
item.description: The best affordable alternatives to Dior Sauvage. Fresh, peppery, ambroxan-rich clones at a fraction of the price.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Smellmaxxing Guide 2026: The Ultimate Fragrance Optimization
item.description: The complete guide to smellmaxxing: optimizing your fragrance game for maximum compliments, confidence, and personal brand.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Celebrity Fragrances Guide: What 101 Celebrities Actually Wear
item.description: Discover the actual fragrances worn by 101 celebrities. From David Beckham to Rihanna to Zendaya.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Fragrance Layering Guide: How to Combine Perfumes
item.description: Master the art of fragrance layering. Learn which scent families pair well and create your own unique combination.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Date Night Fragrances: Seductive Scents for Romance
item.description: Warm, seductive fragrances perfect for date night. Scents that create attraction and leave a lasting impression.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Niche Fragrances Under $100
item.description: Unique, artisan fragrances that won't break the bank. Niche quality at accessible prices.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Best Budget Colognes for Teens
item.description: Affordable colognes perfect for teenage guys. Fresh, clean scents under $30 that get compliments at school.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Trending Pistachio Fragrances: The Hottest Note of 2026
item.description: Pistachio is the trendiest note in perfumery right now. Discover the best pistachio fragrances of 2026.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise

item.title: Trending Marshmallow Fragrances: Sweet Gourmand Scents
item.description: The best marshmallow fragrances for sweet, cozy vibes. Gourmand perfumes that smell like a warm hug.
item.dc:creator: ScentWise
